title: helianthemum × rigualii
intro: Helianthemum × rigualii, also known as Rockrose, is a hybrid plant species in the Cistaceae family, a combination of Helianthemum alpestre and H. nummularium. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Helianthemum × rigualii include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, or used in topical applications to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
